text.title: Lead Magnet for Solo Consultancy Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of Lead Magnet for Solo Consultancy MUST enforce. Rationale + source per rule. Rules referenced by id from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Magnet MUST filter to qualified buyers; vanity-volume (signups / week) is a forbidden primary metric.
rule.rationale: Solo consultants sell time, not seats; a 10k-signup list with 0 fits is net-negative for the operator.

rule.statement: Magnet MUST make exactly one narrow promise (one outcome, one ICP, one situation). Multi-promise magnets MUST be split.
rule.rationale: Single-promise magnets convert 3-5x better and pre-qualify in copy alone.

rule.statement: Format MUST be one of: niche audit checklist, opinionated benchmark report, code snippet pack, calculator. Generic eBooks / top-N posts are forbidden.
rule.rationale: These four formats encode the consultant's opinion / data / mechanic; generic formats encode nothing and rank against larger publishers.

rule.statement: Every claim, benchmark number, and screenshot MUST cite source (URL, transcript_id, dashboard snapshot) inline.
rule.rationale: Unsourced benchmarks are why generic lead magnets fail trust audits; sourcing IS the moat.

rule.statement: Magnet MUST ship with a 7-day follow-up sequence (>=3 emails) wired to the same audience. Standalone magnets are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Conversion happens in days 2-7, not on download; a magnet without follow-up forfeits 80% of attributable revenue.

rule.statement: First version MUST ship within 5 working days. Methodology MUST be skipped if scope blows past that.

rationale.source: Solo-build heuristic — Tiago Forte, Building a Second Brain

rule.rationale: Solo-consultant magnets that miss the week-cap signal misfit format; cut scope, do not extend.

rule.statement: If applicability preconditions are unmet (see AGENTS.md Skip If), the methodology MUST be skipped and a one-line skip-reason logged.
rule.rationale: A named skip terminal keeps decision-tree leaves resolvable and prevents silent misuse on misfit inputs.
